# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: kubepolicy/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: demo-authorizationpolicy-with-defaults # Replace "demo" with the actual namespace you are in (usually "default") 
  namespace: demo 
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
  rules:
    - verbs:
        - get
        - list
        - watch
      apiGroups:
        - "*" # Replace the "*" with the specific API group you want to authorize for.
      resources:
        - namespaces
        - services # Replace this with your custom resources in the namespace (you may need to adjust)
